title: Plated Elytras
description: A data pack that adds Elytras with (minor) armor values to the game. Tries to be balanced while adding some quality of life to the game.
body:
This data pack allows players to combine their Elytra with a chestplate of their choice. One half of the chestplate's armor value is added to the Elytra. The chestplate's enchantments are not transferred over (balance choice).

For versions < 1.20.5, you can craft your Plated Elytra by throwing a `slime ball`, `elytra` and a `chestplate` of your choice on top of an anvil.

For versions 1.20.5+, you can craft the Plated Elytras by putting a `slime ball`, your `chestplate` of choice and an `elytra` inside a crafting grid. The old anvil method has been removed. Additionally, the Netherite variant is now fire resistent.

To view the custom textures, please install the resource pack, too.
